name: AMB Property Corporation
description: AMB Property Corporation was a leading global developer and owner of industrial real estate, focused on major hub ports and distribution markets. In 2011, AMB Property Corporation merged with ProLogis in a merger of equals to form Prologis, the world's largest industrial real estate company. The combined company operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in logistics and supply chain facilities across the Americas, Europe, and Asia.
